source: latency: eval/reports/report-rtx-3060.md; memory: measured on the RTX 3090 (outputs/ci/report.md)
note: Server-side latency = mean `total` ms per vla-server call; memory = peak VRAM (nvidia-smi --query-compute-apps). peak_vram_mib is the ACTUAL RTX 3090 measurement (a 3090 reserves larger CUDA buffers than the 3060, so it is rebaselined here). server_total_ms is still the prior RTX 3060 sweep as a 'no slower than the 3060' bar (the 3090 meets-or-beats it). Gate = actual <= tolerance * baseline.
